cases.prompt: Capture this learning in qmd so the project knowledge stays reusable.
cases.expected_behavior: Writes durable project knowledge in qmd form.

cases.prompt: Add the decision and convention to the knowledge base with the right qmd structure.
cases.expected_behavior: Stores a reusable knowledge artifact with context.

cases.prompt: Search the docs for the answer.
cases.expected_behavior: This is search, not knowledge capture.

cases.prompt: We learned a new constraint during debugging; record it in qmd with links to the related files.
cases.expected_behavior: Captures a stable lesson and its context.
